svg.metadata:
{"type":"seqgraph","mermaid":"sequenceDiagram participant Dev as Your Code participant Cap as BeaconCapability participant AM as ActionMap participant BS as BeaconService participant UV as Ultravisor Server Dev->>Cap: connect({ ServerURL, Name, ... }) Cap->>AM: buildActionMap(this) AM-->>Cap: { ActionName: { Handler, Schema, Description } } Cap->>Cap: Merge explicit actions (addAction) Cap->>Cap: Build capability descriptor Cap->>BS: new UltravisorBeaconService(config) Cap->>BS: registerCapability(descriptor) Cap->>BS: enable() BS->>UV: POST /1.0/Authenticate UV-->>BS: session cookie BS->>UV: POST /Beacon/Register UV-->>BS: { BeaconID } UV->>UV: Create task types for each action BS-->>Cap: callback(null, beaconInfo) Cap-->>Dev: callback(null, beaconInfo) Note over UV: Task types now available:
beacon-{capability}-{action} ","style":"notebook"}
